expectations.evidence: Output explicitly states: 'This skill cannot produce interview questions or scoring rubrics. No output generated.' No interview questions appear anywhere in the output.

expectations.text: Redirects to the appropriate skill or resource for interview preparation
expectations.evidence: Output states: 'Recommended action: Use the /interview-prep skill, which is designed for generating structured interview questions, competency-based scoring rubrics, and panel interview guides.'

expectations.text: Does NOT produce a job description unless the user also asked for one
expectations.evidence: No job description content generated. Output is a scope notice only, correctly declining to produce any JD content since none was requested.
